## Editing.CollectionManager class

Implementation of collection management operations. Wraps a SubLibraryBase instance to provide collection-level CRUD.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class CollectionManager<TCompositeId extends string, TBaseId extends string, TItem> implements ICollectionManager 
```
**Implements:** [ICollectionManager](./ts-chocolate.editing.icollectionmanager.md)
